title: Find My Device - Allow location [Android]
scenario: Find My Device feature requests location permission with Always allow, Allow while using app, and Don't allow options in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. Tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon).
expected: A pop-up window appears asking for location permission with options: 'Always allow', 'Allow while using app', 'Don't allow'.
